item.title: JohnDugganSport: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 30min Coventry City broke my little heart in 1987, but they are the home of 2-Tone. So th
item.description: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 30min Coventry City broke my little heart in 1987, but they are the home of 2-Tone. So they’re alright. Kudos to Frank Lampard. Rolled up his sleeves and got on with it. 1 8 1 mil

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 50min Can KIM ROQUE land the Scottish Grand National?
@sportingsamcan certainly thinks so.

item.description: Racing TV @RacingTV · 54min Do not miss the @coral Scottish Grand National live on Racing TV on Saturday @ayrracecourse 2 3 2 mil

item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h John and Thady Gosden filly shoots to head of Oaks market after stunning debut success De racingpost.com 2 1 2 2 mil

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 1h "It’s a real honour to pick up this ride!"
@OsborneSaffie can't wait to partner Touleen
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 1h "It’s a real honour to pick up this ride!"
@OsborneSaffie can't wait to partner Touleen at @NewburyRacing tomorrow... De attheraces.com 9 3 mil
